title: Backend Developer Vacancy at IBM India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at IBM India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? IBM India in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IBM India:
IBM India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IBM India!
